scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.ollama:pull: ollama pull llama3.2 && ollama pull nomic-embed-text
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && cp client/dist/index.html server/dist/spa-index.html
scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate && npm run vercel-migrate-if-hosted && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && cp client/dist/index.html server/dist/spa-index.html && rm -rf public client/public && cp -R client/dist public && cp -R client/dist client/public
